title: Zanthoxylum ekmanii
intro: Zanthoxylum ekmanii, also known as the Dominican prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and infections. Bioactive constituents found in Zanthoxylum ekmanii include alkaloids, such as berberine and protopine, as well as phenolic compounds and essential oils. Traditionally, Zanthoxylum ekmanii is prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for its purported medicinal properties.
